name: Enchilada Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry ground beef and onion until the ground beef is lightly browned. Drain well.
2. Stir in enchilada sauce and soups. Add garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder, and cumin to taste.
3. Simmer a few minutes, stirring often, until all ingredients are blended.
4. In a 13x9 pan, spread a small amount of the beef filling in the bottom of the pan. Sprinkle with cheese.
5. Cover with 5 of the tortillas, torn into strips.
6. Add more filling, cheese, another layer of tortillas, then final filling layer.
7. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 30-45 minutes (until tortillas are soft). Sprinkle top with grated cheese during the final 10 minutes of cooking.
8. Best if refrigerated several hours before baking. Adjust cooking time to 1 hour.
